QueryExtension.SQL: SELECT ${param.caseNumber} AS "C.CASE_NUMBER" , REF.RV_IIT_CODE_1 AS "C.STATUS" FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF WHERE REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'EVENT_SETTING_CASE_STATUS' AND REF.RV_LOW_VALUE IN ( SELECT CE.STD_EVENT_ID FROM ( SELECT CE1.STD_EVENT_ID FROM CASE_EVENTS CE1 WHERE CE1.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CE1.DELETED_FLAG = 'N' AND CE1.STD_EVENT_ID IN ( SELECT REF1.RV_LOW_VALUE FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF1 WHERE REF1.RV_DOMAIN = 'EVENT_SETTING_CASE_STATUS' ) ORDER BY CE1.EVENT_DATE DESC, CE1.EVENT_SEQ DESC ) CE WHERE ROWNUM = 1 )
